items.title: UK rolls out free AI training, but will it save your job?
items.description: Free artificial intelligence training is being made available to everyone in the UK as the government steps up efforts to prepare the workforce for rapid technological change.  From today, adults can access short, practical courses through the government's upgraded AI Skills Hub, designed to help people use AI tools in the workplace.  The training covers everyday tasks such as drafting text, creating content, and automating administrative work - with some courses taking less than 20 minutes to complete.

items.title: S&P 500 touches 7,000 for first time then retreats as traders await Fed decision: Live updates
